sentences.arabic: أَكَلَتِ الْعَائِلَةُ وَقَالُوا بِسْمِ اللَّهِ قَبْلَ الطَّعَامِ.
sentences.translation: Porodica je jela i rekli su Bismillah prije hrane.
sentences.translationEn: The family ate and said Bismillah before the food.

sentences.arabic: عَلَّمَ الْأَبُ الطِّفْلَ أَنْ يَقُولَ الْبَسْمَلَةَ دَائِمًا.
sentences.translation: Otac je naučio dijete da uvijek kaže Bismillah.
sentences.translationEn: The father taught the child to always say Bismillah.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ: نَقُولُ بِسْمِ اللَّهِ لِأَنَّ كُلَّ الرِّزْقِ مِنَ اللَّهِ.
sentences.translation: Rekao je: Govorimo Bismillah jer je sva opskrba od Allaha.
sentences.translationEn: He said: We say Bismillah because all provision is from God.

sentences.translation: Dijete je razumjelo i samo izgovorilo Bismillah.
sentences.translationEn: The child understood and said Bismillah himself.
